brand.name: ProctoCare by Vishva
brand.vibe: Premium, personal, trustworthy, warm, clean, luxury healthcare
brand.target_audience: Patients in tier-2 cities seeking high-end specialist care

rules: Never center by default, define explicit alignment
Use font-medium (500) or font-semibold (600) for elegance
text-base md:text-lg for primary body text

background.description: Bone white / soft warm beige for a nurturing, non-clinical feel

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, generous padding, uncrowded layouts.

header.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FBFBF9]/80 border-b border-[#1A5B5E]/10 sticky top-0 z-50

cards.classes: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(26,91,94,0.04)] border border-[#1A5B5E]/5 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(26,91,94,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1 p-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A5B5E] text-white hover:bg-[#134648] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8F0F0] text-[#1A5B5E] hover:bg-[#D8E6E6] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.emergency: bg-[#B04242] text-white hover:bg-[#8F3333] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors animate-pulse

components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Calendar, and Popover for the booking system.
components.tables: Use Shadcn Table for the Admin Dashboard.

rules: Smooth entrance animations for grid items (framer-motion staggered fade up)
Hover states must be explicitly defined (e.g. hover:text-white)
Use lenis for smooth scrolling to add a premium momentum feel

media.rules: No placeholder images. Use provided URLs. Soft overlays over hero.

hero_background.description: Elegant smooth warm beige texture for the hero background. MUST use overlay: bg-white/40 or bg-[#FBFBF9]/60 to ensure text contrast.

doctor_consulting.description: Warm, trustworthy doctor consulting a patient. Use in 'About Doctor' or 'Why Choose Us' sections.

clinic_interior.description: Bright, modern premium clinic interior. Use for trust indicators or testimonials background.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors: brand primary #1A5B5E, background #FBFBF9, accent #C9B69B.
Implement Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body text.
Build standard multi-page structure with React Router.
Dashboard should be a separate route (/admin) with high-density grid layouts using Archetype 4 rules (Swiss & High Contrast), but keeping the teal brand color.
In the Marketing pages, strictly follow the generous spacing (p-8, p-12) and avoid Shadcn Card containers unless heavily stripped and customized.
Implement Floating WhatsApp CTA and Sticky Book Appointment CTA.
Use standard pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts and Shadcn for interactive logic (Forms, Calendars in booking).
